OTHER DEFT. RICK HOOPER NOT PRESENT AND JURY TRIAL AS TO HOOPER STRICKEN - CONT'D FOR COURT TRIAL BY COURT ON 9/4/96. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT NOT STATED ON RECORD BUT COURT ASKED PLFF AND DEFT DIAZ WHETHER THE JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COURT, ENTITLED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AGAINST JACKIE DIAZ, ONLY" WAS THEIR TRUE AGREEMENT, AND BOTH CONFIRMED AND STATED "YES" - THEY BOTH AGREED ON. ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT (SIGNED BY DEFT JACKIE DIAZ) ON HOLD UNTIL THE CASE ON HOOPER IS FINISHED, AND COUNSEL WILL CONSOLIDATE THE JUDGMENTS AT THE PROPER TIME, SO THAT THERE COULD BE ONLY ONE JUDGMENT.
